title: 宝塚記念の後に・小さな青いバラ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the support of her fans at her back, Rice
Shower runs in the Takarazuka Kinen. Although
she isn't able to take the win...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She still sees how many people she's made smile.
At last, she has become the blue rose she always
aspired to be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the race behind her, she decides she wants
to run in the Arima Kinen against Mihono
Bourbon and Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like the Takarazuka Kinen, only racers selected
by the fans can run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her state her intention to run in such a
prestigious race without a hint of apprehension, I
can sense how much Rice Shower has grown.
